title: Lucka Maattikkichi Lyrics Vasuvum Saravananum Onna Padichavanga Song Lyrics

stanzas:
Song: Lucka Maattikkichi
Singer(s) D. Imman, Dholak Gana Jagan, Senthildass & Palaniammal
Movie : Vasuvum Saravananum Onna Padichavanga

irukkum irukkum
pora varaikkum machaan
ava mela vachcha kadhal
nelachi irukkum

Bodha yeththa thaevayilla
wishky brandi wine-u.
en figura paartha podhum
naanum aayiduven
doiyinnu

kodi figure vandhaalum
ava thaan da
en queenu
Indha ulagathula
avathaan enakku mainu

en bikeu senja punniyam
en kooda doublesu vandhaa.
ava kayyi pattathaala
en satta kaattudhu bandhaa

Foreign-u sarakka pola
pala palanu tholu.
Wine-u bottle-la pola
gilu gilunnu kaalu.

Sampaign style pola
irukkum pechu.
avaloda kannu veechu
large-u
scotch-u

kodi figure vandhaalum
ava thaanda en queenu.
Indha ulagathula
avathaan enakku mainu

Ava jeanu potta devadha
aanaa sceneu pottu kaattala.
avala vida bejaaraa
ayyo enakku edhuvum maattala.

Romba naalu varaikkum
manasu plain boardu
Chalk-u piecea pola
potta oru kodu.
appathaan start aachu
loveu moodu
ooru kannu pattadhaala
aachu kedu.

kodi figure vandhaalum
ava thaanda en queenu.
Indha ulagathula
avathaan enakku mainu

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Lucka Maattikkichi'?

The song 'Lucka Maattikkichi' celebrates love and attraction with a fun and playful vibe.

What is the plot context of the movie 'Vasuvum Saravananum Onna Padichavanga'?

The movie revolves around the comedic situations faced by the lead characters as they navigate love and relationships.

Who are the singers of the song?

The song features vocals by Dholak Gana Jagan, Palaniammal, and Senthil Dass.

Who is the music director for 'Lucka Maattikkichi'?

The music for 'Lucka Maattikkichi' is composed by D Imman.

When was 'Lucka Maattikkichi' released?

'Lucka Maattikkichi' was released on August 1, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Lucka Maattikkichi', the characters express their playful affection through lively beats and catchy lyrics. The song is a celebration of love, capturing the excitement and joy of romantic attraction. Its upbeat tempo and engaging vocals make it perfect for festive occasions. The vibrant energy of the song reflects the lighthearted nature of the movie, making it a memorable highlight.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Lucka Maattikkichi is a vibrant dance number that perfectly captures the festive spirit of Vasuvum Saravananum Onna Padichavanga. With the energetic vocals of Dholak Gana Jagan, Palaniammal, and Senthil Dass, this track is sure to get everyone on their feet. D Imman's catchy composition adds a unique flavor, making it a must-listen for any celebration.
stanzaMeanings: Lucka Maattikkichi Lucka Maattikkichi Lucka Maattikkichi is a striking figure.
Lucka Maattikkichi Lucka Maattikkichi my lover is like a zero.
She is very attractive, my heart beats for her.
As long as she is around, my friend, love will flourish for her.
Lucka Maattikkichi Lucka Maattikkichi Lucka Maattikkichi is a striking figure.
Lucka Maattikkichi Lucka Maattikkichi my lover is like a zero.
There is no need for a wish, just wine will do. Just seeing my figure makes me feel good.
Even if a beautiful figure comes, she is my queen. In this world, she is my main.
The good deeds done on my bike will come back to me. If she holds my hand, my power will show up.
Like a foreigner, many things are lost. Like a wine bottle, my legs are wobbly.
The talk is like a campaign style. Her eyes are wide, and she drinks scotch.
Even if a beautiful figure comes, she is my queen. In this world, she is my main.
Lucka Maattikkichi Lucka Maattikkichi Lucka Maattikkichi is a striking figure.
When she wears jeans, it’s a scene to behold. I can’t change anything about her, she’s too good.
For a long time, my heart was plain like a chalkboard. That’s when love started, and my eyes got caught.
Even if a beautiful figure comes, she is my queen. In this world, she is my main.
